name: Softcat PLC
description: A leading UK IT infrastructure and services provider, supplying hardware, software and services to corporate and public sector customers. Entirely debt-free with high cash conversion.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: GII growth of 11-27% pa driven by customer account growth (~15,000 customers), cross-selling, public sector digitalisation, cloud migration, and cybersecurity demand. FY2025 GII £3,617m (+26.8%).
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying operating margin on GII ~5%. Asset-light model with zero debt and cash conversion consistently 90-96%. Gross profit margin ~14% on GII.
assumptions.risks: Macro-driven IT spending delays, vendor concentration (Microsoft, Cisco), competition from CDW/Insight, talent retention. Revenue volatility from IFRS 15 principal/agent shifts.
assumptions.catalyst: Continued customer acquisition, average customer spend growth, public sector framework wins, Oakland acquisition integration, and excess cash returns via special dividends.
